summary: Consensus: 37 analysts, avg PT ~$571-572. Range: low $392 (Stifel Hold) to high $675. The Motley Fool cites $625 consensus. 32 Buy ratings as of April 29, 2026. BMO lowered PT to $505. Overall consensus 'Strong Buy'.
